text: got picked for jury duty again and the judge remembered me from last time lol
i treat the hotel buffet like a competitive sport. no shame
entered a roundabout and just kept going around 4 times bc i panicked
lost an hour of sleep and my will to live thx daylight savings
wife made the same casserole for the 3rd night. im scared to say anything
knocked on my neighbors door to ask for wifi password and they pretended not to be home
filed a noise complaint about the guy who filed a noise complaint about me
took me 11 minutes to parallel park while a cafe full of people watched
left my cart in aisle 7 and never went back. some say its still there
my voicemail has been full since 2019 and i plan to keep it that way
someone at the gym was curling in the squat rack and i almost called the police
self checkout yelled UNEXPECTED ITEM IN BAGGING AREA and i had a breakdown
my hoa sent me a letter about my trash can being visible from the street
charcoal is superior and i will die on this hill. propane people are cowards
mother in law rearranged my kitchen while i was at work
bought a kayak at 2am after 3 glasses of wine. it arrives tuesday
the tsa agent complimented my socks and it was the highlight of my year
jury duty snacks were actually fire ngl
guy next to me at the buffet was using two plates at once. respect
i use the self checkout even for a full cart because i trust no one
my neighbor mows at 7am on saturdays and i think thats a war crime
airport people who clap when the plane lands scare me
someone hogged the bench press for 45 min while scrolling tiktok
hoa said my garden gnome is too tall. its 14 inches
father in law grilled my steak well done on purpose i just know it
ordered a roomba at 1am and honestly best drunk purchase ever
the roundabout near costco has claimed 3 of my side mirrors
buffet strategy: start with the shrimp. always start with the shrimp
i pretend to be on a call when someone tries to talk to me at the gym
daylight savings made me late to a meeting i didnt want to attend anyway
self checkout machine rejected my coupon and the line behind me grew hostile
my hoa president has a vendetta against my basketball hoop
propane is just an outdoor microwave and you know it
ate my wifes leftovers and chose violence apparently
someone at the airport took their shoes off at the gate. not tsa. the gate.
wifi went out and i realized i have no hobbies
jury selection asked if i could be impartial and i hesitated too long
the guy who doesnt rerack weights at my gym also double parks. confirmed
bought a trampoline drunk. kids love it tho so who really won
my mother in law brings her own spices when she visits
left the roundabout on the wrong exit and ended up in a different zip code
someone abandoned a full cart at self checkout and walked out. legend
hoa fined me $50 for having a doormat they deemed too whimsical
im on a first name basis with the buffet hostess at golden corral
parallel parked perfectly on the first try once in 2014 and i peaked
at the airport bar at 7am because time isnt real in terminals
voicemail is a trap designed to waste everyones time
the self checkout camera shows my face and i look guilty even buying milk
neighbor called the hoa on my christmas lights. in october. theyre halloween lights
gym guy was doing bicep curls in the doorway. just the doorway
bbq brisket should take 12 hours minimum or dont even invite me
in laws showed up a day early and i was in my underwear eating cereal
3am amazon order: a 6ft inflatable dinosaur costume. zero regrets
asked for jury duty postponement and they gave me a worse date somehow
the supermarket moved the bread aisle again and i nearly lost it
someone at the buffet sneezed near the salad bar. evacuation necessary
my wifi password is taped to the router and i still forget it
daylight savings means my microwave clock is wrong for 6 months
abandoned my cart bc they opened a new register and i was too far away
the airport moving walkway people who just stand there are menaces
hoa meeting lasted 3 hours bc of a fence height debate. 3 hours
grilled corn is the most underrated bbq side and ill fight about it
my noise machine broke and now i can hear my neighbors tv through the wall
self checkout asked me to wait for assistance and i blacked out from rage
mother in law said my meatloaf was interesting. interesting.
bought a label maker at midnight and labeled everything in my house by dawn
someone was facetiming at full volume in the gym sauna. full volume
jury duty wifi was faster than my home wifi and that broke me
the roundabout yield sign means nothing to anyone apparently
buffet plate 1: recon. plate 2: the real mission. plate 3: victory lap
left a voicemail once in 2022 and i still think about how awkward it was
airport bathroom stall graffiti is the original social media
parallel parking test should not be part of the drivers exam its cruel
someone returned a half eaten rotisserie chicken at self checkout
hoa wants me to paint my door a pre approved shade of beige. beige
brother in law always brings store bought cookies to the bbq. always
drunk purchased a 10lb bag of gummy bears. currently on pound 4
gym mirror selfie guy took 37 photos. i counted
daylight savings is government mandated jet lag and nobody talks about it
if your bbq sauce comes from a bottle dont talk to me about grilling
supermarket rearranged again and peanut butter is now in aisle 12 WHY
got called for jury duty on my birthday. the system knows
neighbors wifi is called FBI Surveillance Van and i respect the energy
self checkout scale is more sensitive than my ex
buffet dessert section first is a valid strategy dont @ me
hoa sent a drone to check roof compliance. a drone
airport power outlet hunters are the most desperate people on earth
woke up to find i ordered 12 pool noodles last night. its november
the gym has a sign that says wipe down equipment and nobody reads it
my father in law corrects my grill temperature every single time
left my cart at self checkout to grab one thing and someone stole my spot
noise complaint about my wind chimes. theyre bamboo. its calming. allegedly
parallel parked so bad i just went home instead
the roundabout near the mall needs a traffic therapist not a traffic light
shopping cart with one bad wheel is my villain origin story
voicemail transcription butchered my name so bad i screenshot it
someone brought a whole pizza to jury duty and didnt share
buffet crab legs are a trap. you spend 20 min for 2 bites
in laws stayed 9 days. the invite said weekend
hoa approved colors list has 14 shades of gray and im not joking
